text: Drinking hot water does not cure viral respiratory infections or kill the virus.
Saltwater gargling is a common home remedy but does not prevent COVID-19 infection.
source: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (India)

text: Lemon juice alone does not treat or cure chronic health conditions but provides Vitamin C support.
Vaccines are rigorously tested and have been proven safe for general populations by multiple health agencies.
source: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
